\tzpentry{ID5824}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5824 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\mathcal{R}(S_{\text{obs}}) = \arg\min_{\Psi_0} \left\|\mathcal{F}(\Psi_0) - S_{\text{obs}}\right\|_{\mathcal{H}}^2$
\]
